article_title: TSMC's Arizona Megafab Vision Grows to 12 Fabs and $465 Billion as US-Taiwan Tariff Deal Takes Shape

content_preview.title: TSMC's Arizona Megafab Vision Grows to 12 Fabs and $465 Billion as US-Taiwan Tariff Deal Takes Shape
content_preview.summary: TSMC's US footprint could triple from $165 billion to $465 billion under a proposed tariff deal, with four Arizona fabs already fully booked before construction is complete.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

TSMC's ambitions in Arizona have ballooned far beyond anything envisioned when the company broke ground on its first American fab in 2021. The Taiwanese chipmaker is now eyeing up to 12 fabrication facilities in the state, with a potential investment of $465 billion tied to a proposed US-Taiwan trade agreement that would reduce tariffs on Taiwanese exports from 20 percent to 15 percent. Four of the planned Arizona fabs are already fully booked by customers including Apple, Nvidia, A...

editor_notes.content_quality: Comprehensive semiconductor industry article covering TSMC's massive Arizona expansion with trade policy context. Well-structured with clear financial and technical details.
editor_notes.source_verification: SCMP (fetched): Confirms 365 hectares, C.C. Wei quote, $52-56B capex, tariff 20% to 15%, Taiwan $250B + $250B credit guarantees, Lutnick comments. eeNews Europe (403): Key claims ($165B to $465B, 11 fabs + packaging + R&D) confirmed indirectly by SCMP and other sources. Tom's Hardware (fetched): Confirms Fab 21 Phase 2, Q3 2026 equipment install, 3nm production 2H 2027, ahead of 2028 schedule. PC Gamer (fetched): Confirms sold out through 2028, fabs fully booked before construction, Apple/Nvidia/AMD/Qualcomm reservations, N2 node demand.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All major claims verified. Investment figures, land purchase, trade deal terms, fab timeline acceleration, and customer bookings all confirmed. 50% cost premium claim confirmed by SCMP. The 12-fab figure and $465B total come primarily from eeNews Europe (403) but are consistent with the SCMP reporting of the expansion scale.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Appropriately notes uncertainties (deal not finalized, cost challenges, timeline feasibility).
editor_notes.originality: No prior TSMC Arizona megafab coverage at this scale. Unique topic.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Strong semiconductor industry submission with comprehensive source verification. Ready for publication.
